title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Meesho Logistics - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Meesho Logistics - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Meesho Logistics! We are hiring a Distribution Manager for our Thane team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Meesho Logistics:
Meesho Logistics is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Meesho Logistics!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
